name: FTMO
description_short: The most established proprietary trading firm offering funded accounts up to $200K after a two-phase evaluation, with 90% profit splits.
description_long:
FTMO is the world's most recognized proprietary trading firm (prop firm), offering traders the opportunity to trade with funded capital after passing a structured evaluation process. Founded in Prague in 2015, FTMO has paid out hundreds of millions of dollars in profits to successful traders.

The evaluation process consists of two phases: the FTMO Challenge (Phase 1) where traders must reach a 10% profit target within 30 days while respecting a 5% daily loss limit and 10% maximum loss limit, followed by the Verification (Phase 2) with a 5% profit target within 60 days under the same risk rules. Once both phases are passed, traders receive an FTMO Account with up to 90% profit split.

FTMO supports trading on MetaTrader 4, MetaTrader 5, and cTrader across forex, indices, commodities, stocks, and crypto. Account sizes range from $10,000 to $200,000. The firm provides free trials, performance analytics, a trading journal, and account analysis tools. FTMO is known for its transparency, reliable payouts (processed biweekly), and professional trader community.
affiliate_program: FTMO US Affiliate Program (JV Prop / OANDA)
affiliate_commission: 8-20% tiered on first fee (Bronze 8%, Silver 10%, Gold 15%, Platinum 20%)
pros: Free trial available to test before paying
Challenge fee refunded on first payout
Biweekly payouts with multiple withdrawal methods
cons: Strict drawdown rules lead to many failed attempts
Challenge fees are non-refundable if you fail
No scaling plan — must purchase larger accounts separately
Weekend holding restrictions on some account types
company_background: FTMO is an educational and technology-driven company that makes trading accessible through simulated environments by empowering traders who are ready to perform but not yet backed by sufficient capital. Since 2015, the company has helped traders test their skills in a simulated trading environment and, if they meet required criteria, become eligible for financial rewards.
scraped_features: 1-Step FTMO Challenge with 10% Max Loss and 90% profit split
Advanced support via Live chat, email, or WhatsApp
Tailored tools & services for trader growth
Scaling Plan and Premium Programme for advancing traders
Top performers eligible to progress to Quantlane (live capital proprietary trading firm)
unique_selling_points: 90% profit split to traders on successful evaluations
Simulated trading environment with real monetary rewards (zero personal capital risk during evaluation)
3.5M+ customers across 140+ countries with $500M+ paid in rewards
Educational focus on trading psychology, risk management, and discipline
2025 Strategic partnership with OANDA expanding access to US market
Founders recognized as EY Entrepreneur Of The Year - Technology Entrepreneur (2022)
